summary:
POLITICAL OBSERVATIONS AND TECHNOLOGICAL REVOLUTION: Brandon shares visions concerning President Donald Trump, emphasizing an urgent need to pray for his marriage to Melania, as they are targets chosen by God for this specific era. He connects a recent AI summit led by Trump to a prophesied industrial revolution and crypto age where America will lead the world and outpace China. Brandon advises believers to capitalize on this transient wave of financial and housing increases. However, he warns of a coming plague in 2027, aligned with significant celestial events, including the longest solar and lunar eclipses in over a century expected in August of that year.

ESCHATOLOGICAL TIMELINES AND ADAM'S LEASE: Brandon discusses an 800-year-old prophecy from a Jewish rabbi regarding the red heifer sacrifice, noting that practice runs are currently happening, which signals the imminent return of the Messiah. He explains the theological concept of Adam's lease, a 6,000-year period of human dominion that was lost through treason but restored by Jesus Christ. As this lease nears its expiration between 2027 and 2032, Brandon predicts a profound 24-hour shift where the world will fundamentally change. Following this, a brief sliver of time will emerge, devoid of satanic interference, allowing a massive global revival before the rapture, the seven-year tribulation, and the millennial reign.

GLOBAL REVIVAL AND SOUL HARVEST: Brandon details a prophetic vision illustrating the forthcoming spiritual awakening, likening it to a fleet of massive shrimping boats pulling in overflowing nets of fish amidst turbulent oceanic waters. This symbolizes a modern-day soul-winning anointing that will sweep across humanity. He envisions glowing, massive church bells, reminiscent of Notre-Dame, ringing out to send shockwaves across the land to awaken a dormant church. During this brief window of time, angelic hosts will be dispatched to remove demonic blinders from unbelievers, granting them a completely unhindered opportunity to accept Jesus. He stresses that the church must break down denominational and racial barriers to unite for this ultimate harvest.

SUPERNATURAL RESTORATION AND DIVINE FAVOR: Brandon reflects on a vision of Jesus and Judas, focusing on the biblical story of the woman with the issue of blood to demonstrate God's complete restoration. He explains that faith does not merely heal but makes a person entirely whole, restoring everything lost to illness or hardship. Believers are promised double for their trouble, supernatural favor in unlikely places, and a profound financial harvest. He encourages his audience to believe in God for exceedingly abundant blessings, emphasizing that the wealth of the sinner is laid up for the righteous and that the law of seedtime and harvest remains in full effect to establish God's covenant with His people.

SPIRITUAL GIFTS AND THE REFINER'S FIRE: Brandon delivers a teaching on the severe cost of spiritual anointing and prophetic gifts, warning that there are no shortcuts to spiritual maturity. Using an analogy of a father trusting his son with a Ferrari, he explains that God only entrusts powerful spiritual gifts to those who have endured the painful process of character refinement, much like a caterpillar struggling in a cocoon, David fleeing from Saul, or Joseph enduring the pit and prison. Brandon cautions against pride, seeking a microwave anointing, or showing off spiritual gifts, noting that God will sternly correct His children to keep them on the right path and that all supernatural manifestations must strictly deflect glory back to the Father to draw the lost to salvation.

REPENTANCE AND ETERNAL DECISIONS: Brandon emphasizes the urgency of salvation, warning that no one is promised tomorrow and referencing figures like Ozzy Osbourne to illustrate that it is never too late to repent. He urges individuals bound by addiction, sin, or despair to surrender entirely to Jesus, assuring them that no sin is too great for God's forgiveness and that the truth of the Bible is the only path to true freedom. Through a message of grace and mercy, he explains that Christianity is about a personal relationship rather than religion, encouraging new believers to immerse themselves in the Word of God, join a Bible-believing church, and undergo water baptism to begin their spiritual journey.
rawData: [July 24, 2025]-[The church bells]-[https://youtu.be/uZLhwFbcqTY]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me today. Well, it's Diana and Brandon again. Doesn't she look so beautiful today? I got her a new shirt and she was excited. I told her, I said, 'I love the way you look today, baby. Y'all fixed up for the camera.' We want to talk to y'all about what's going on, and we're so excited about the video we have for you today. Last time I talked to you all about the things I saw about Donald Trump's son, and we went over all that. It's an urgency, but there was more to what the Lord showed me about praying for President Trump and his marriage. I saw an attack against his marriage. You can even see their body language and things that are going on with that, and the Lord said, 'Pray for his marriage.' So, that was another thing that I didn't bring up last time because it was so much. But in my prayer time this week, I've tried to do these live videos all week long, but we've been so busy. I told Diana, 'I've got to get a video out at least on Thursday,' and I apologize, folks. It's been wild. The things I've seen praying this week have been amazing, but they're not for you all. It's a lot of private things that the Lord is talking to us about—our ministry, what we're doing, Him just instructing us, and we're growing in our walk. It's just amazing. I told Dee, 'I wish I could go on here and tell them what's going on, but the Lord told me it's private.' So, where we're at right now with some of the things that I've seen, I can give you parts of some of the things I've seen this week. Everything I've warned you all about 2027, and I see a plague. I told Braden we were talking about these rats running around the ground with this new AI technology. President Trump had his new technological AI summit today, and he wanted to talk about the advancements of how far America is—farther than anybody else—in the AI movement. We have the best chips, we have the best computers, we have the best everything. We're the best. I told you it's going to be an industrial revolution of what we've never ever seen before, and here we are, we're seeing it. President Trump is on there telling everybody today, and I told Braden I said, 'My goodness, prophetic words are coming to pass right before our faces.' Folks, do you understand? It's happening just like the Lord told us it would: a new industrial revolution, a great new crypto age, and all this stuff. And he says, 'We're going to beat China. We're going to be the best. We're going to be the greatest.' And everything, and I'm like, 'Okay, that's great. I'm on board. Let's go. Now, Lord, tell me where to invest,' because I know when the Lord told me, 'You can ride the wave.' If you go back to the last video, 'Ride the wave, Brandon, it's transient. It won't last forever.' But this new wave, I saw all the $100 bills. I saw all this stuff going on with it—housing and all the things that are going to increase. And the Lord showed me, he said, 'You have a window of what's about to happen.' In 2027, I saw a plague. But what I found out was there is a solar and a lunar eclipse. Braden said it's on the first part of August and the middle part of August for a solar and a lunar eclipse. Okay, August of 2027. Right? Catch this: it's the longest one in a hundred years. It's the longest one in over a century, folks. The Bible says He uses the sun, the stars, and the moon to communicate with His people, and I never look at an eclipse as just a coincidence, especially the longest one—six minutes. Now, that's a weird number. It's six minutes long. And I went back and started looking at some old videos. Paul Begley and others were talking about how there was a Jewish rabbi 800 years ago who gave a prophetic word that said, 'The moment you see the red heifer sacrificed in that year, this will be the year that the Messiah comes back.' They're talking about doing practice runs on doing the red heifer right now, but this is an 800-year-old prophecy, and we're in the timeframe. The Lord told me to watch this time we're talking about from the fall. When are we going to see this red heifer sacrifice if they're doing the practice runs and they're doing this? It's been prophesied from 800 years ago by an old rabbi telling us to watch this timeframe. There's only been ten of them in the history of ever doing this, and the last one hasn't been done in over 2,000 years. I'm just like, 'It's right now.' And Braden was telling me, 'Dad, this hasn't been done in 2,000 years. Look at all these amazing things happening in this timeframe right now.' But it's at the door of the window of the Shmita cycle with the blood-red moon again in August and all the things that I was saying. I don't know if there's any kind of eclipse before that, but this is the timeframe of a major one—the first one in a hundred years going into October of what I said, the fall of 2027, warning about a major event that may be taking place that will shape things. And this is another thing: when I'm praying, I hear different pastors and different people saying, 'We need the church to get along. We've got to walk in love for this next revival.' I told you all that this goes along with what the Lord showed me about unity in the church for this great revival that's about to take place so that there's no denominational walls with segregation of color—all kinds of things that are just stupid—but Baptists, Methodists, Catholics, all this. And I thought, 'What's going to take this down? How are we all going to line up, agree, and be one body moving in this earth?' I believe it will come out of a major event, a great shaking like the Lord showed me World War II. We talk about all the time how the women came and everybody came together to make America stand during the war times when our men were sent off to war, but it's bigger than that. And this is what I thought was interesting because the Lord keeps bringing back Adam's lease. It's this: whenever the Lord in Genesis told Adam, 'I'm giving you dominion and authority over all My creation.' This all goes back to He's given man the dominion and authority, and Adam committed high treason, ate the fruit with Eve, and lost it. But Jesus came back, restored what Adam lost, and took it back from Satan. He bridged the gap with His blood. He bridged the gap of what Adam did, and He made it strong again, so that lease is restored back from what Jesus did. So now we have that window of opportunity, and Adam's lease is still in play because Jesus paid the price and took it back from the devil, right? So, that lease is over at 6,000 years. In that 6,000 years, we're in that timeframe. Some people say 2032, some people think 2027 in this next cycle; it depends on who you're listening to. And even the Bible talks about how this generation will not pass before the Son of Man returns, and a generation is 80 years from what I understand. I'm sure I'll have a lot of you correct me if I butcher this, but 80 years. So, that's in the timeframe of where we are right now—that generation will not pass. But what I go back to is what the Lord showed me. He said, 'Brandon, Adam's lease is coming up.' And he said, 'When Adam's lease is up, I'm giving you a sliver of time.' Do you remember that video? I saw the timeline and it was beautiful, and I saw clear back to the beginning of when I saw the earth being created. I saw everything being done, and he showed me how time has progressed from emperors in Europe and all the things over it. It went from thousand-year blocks to hundreds to tens, and it was all in front of my face. And Braden said it was the coolest vision I've ever had. We all still agree it was the most amazing thing that the Lord ever showed me—the timeframe of humanity—and he said, 'And you're right here.' All that being said, where you are right now is you're right there. Adam's lease is coming up, and everything you've ever known is going to change within a 24-hour period. And I keep thinking about what he said: within a 24-hour period, everything's going to change. From Rosh Hashanah to Rosh Hashanah, he said, 'The birthing pains will accelerate. Things are going to accelerate, but you're about to see something you've never seen before.' And I'm like, 'What is this?' And I thought, 'What is going to push us over the edge for this major revival? A calamity again?' Maybe. I believe that the greatest move of God that we're about to see personally, what I'm praying about right now—you all pray with me—is when Adam's lease is completely up, and the restraints that were on that, with God saying, 'I've given you dominion and authority and power over everything, over the birds of the air, the fish of the sea, over the cattle, all over the beasts of the field.' That lease is up of the 6,000 years, which would lead us into a sliver of time. All I need is just a few seconds for this revival, for a day is as a thousand years to the Lord, and a thousand years is as a day, and I just need a couple of milliseconds. All I need is just some nanoseconds for a great revival of time. I saw a sliver, and it was as thin as a hair in the spirit realm. Do you remember what I told you all? I saw as thin as a hair, and in that thinness of a hair, even if it's just for a couple of months, a year, whatever, then the greatest move of God we've ever seen before, and then the catching away of the church, and it steps right into the seven-year tribulation, which goes right into the thousand-year reign. It's exciting. We could be right back-to-back. Like he said, the birthing pains, like I told you when Diana read Maurice Sklar's vision, he said, 'The birthing pains will not stop. They will increase. But I'm giving you, because the church has prayed, the balance of the prayers on that scale I saw, a red scale, balanced out.' And he said, 'I'm giving my church time for the greatest harvest.' And he said, 'For there are scrolls that Satan does not know, the end-time scrolls, but in this, I'm promised a revival, this sliver of time.' That's all he needs. That's all he needs to walk in a way that we've never seen before, to see miracles in a way we've never seen before, to see lives changed. When I saw the angel armies and the angel reserves, do you all remember that? I saw the barns and I saw the edge of heaven. And the Lord said, 'I'm sending two angelic hosts per unbeliever to ward off the demonic spirits, Brandon, in this window so that they will be able to see.' Remember, the Bible says that Satan has blinded the eyes of the unbeliever. He said, 'I'm taking off the restraints. I'm taking them off, giving them an opportunity uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force so they are able to see and make a decision without any kind of demonic force holding them back, so they're freely able to—no blinders from the devil. They're able to say, 'You know what? I really want to choose Jesus today,' or 'You know, I don't want to.' But either way, you choose.' So, we were praying last night in our own family prayer time, and the Lord showed up big time. It was glorious. I tell you what, I saw Judas. The Lord allowed me to see Judas and what he looked like. And I saw Judas walking around with the Lord, and the Lord showed me his ministry on the earth. And I had the greatest glimpse of Jesus's ministry and what he did when he said, 'Be thou made whole.' I saw what it meant to be made whole. It was spiritually, physically, financially, mentally, emotionally—everything that the woman with the issue of blood needed. She spent all she had for 12 years but rather grew worse in her infirmity. She was sick but rather grew worse, spending all she had. But when he said, 'Daughter, your faith has made you whole,' her faith didn't just heal her; her faith made her whole. And everything she had lost through those 12 years of infirmity, spending all she had, was restored back to her in that moment. The Lord blessed her financially—I saw great blessing. And Judas had the pouch of money. And there was—I'm telling you, she was made whole, not just in her body, but everything the cankerworm had eaten, God said, 'I restored it back to her.' Ladies and gentlemen, God is a God of restoration. And what the devil means for bad, God will turn it around for good if you believe Him. In these last days, you're about to see the unthinkable, the exceedingly, abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. I'm talking supernatural things are about to take place in the body of Christ, and He's going to restore back everything the devil has stolen from you. And He owes you back double for your trouble. It's time to believe Him for double for your trouble. It's time to believe Him for the big things. And the Lord showed me that when you get the anointing, when you get the presence of God on your life, people are attracted to it like moths to a light, and blessing flows. Blessing flows. Favor flows. You'll get favor when you least expect it. If you walk into a place and they say, 'You know what? I just want to help you out,' God said, 'Expect favor in the most unlikely places.' Favor is going to start to follow you because the glory is on you. As you walk in these last days, you're going to have a favor that is going to open doors that no man could open, because the glory opened the door. And there's going to be favor such that no man can shut it, no door that any man can shut. The favor of the Lord is going to rest on you in these last days. And favor is coming from—the wealth of the sinner is laid up for the righteous. I want you to hear what the Bible says: 'For the wealth of the sinner is laid up for the righteous.' But it's because the glory is on you. It's because the anointing and the presence of the Lord is on you. And favor follows those that believe. A day of favor is worth a thousand days' labor. You can believe God for the exceedingly abundantly in these last days, folks, and I'm telling you, it's going to show up, and God's going to show up and show off in your life. The seed that the sowers and the reapers are going to go hand in hand, and you're going to walk in an abundance like you've never walked before if you don't deny it. Well, what is it for? It's to establish His covenant with you. It's to establish His covenant with you. He said, 'Brandon, I'm establishing my covenant with my people. Even more so, whatsoever a man sows, that will he also reap. Seedtime and harvest doesn't cease.' If you sow, you reap. It's part of the process. 'Well, I sowed it; I don't really want to reap it.' Well, then it's not biblical what you said; it's law. If I sow into the ground, no matter what kind of seed it is, it will produce if I water it and take care of it. So, we water it and take care of our spiritual seeds. But that's not just about financial blessing; it's about having a good marriage, it's about having good children. It's about having an inheritance for your children's children's children. He owns the cattle on a thousand hills. He said he would provide for his people. Now this is what I saw coming with this financial harvest. I saw boats in a river, and the river was moving just a little bit in this vision. And I saw the boat, and there were some people on this boat, and they were fishing with some fishing poles. It was symbolic; they were bringing in the fish a little at a time. The fish were coming up, and they were throwing them on the deck of the boat. They were rejoicing over the little fish that they caught, and they were like, 'Oh yeah, good. High five. You caught a fish. We got one born again. Good job. High five.' Everybody was high-fiving each other. But as they were faithful with little, I saw what was about to take place: old rivers of revival, old anointings of salvation from John Wesley and Billy Graham and all these greats were going to come on the people in the days ahead. And he said, 'Brandon, a great soul-winning anointing is coming on my bride, and I'm going to bring in this harvest.' And it wasn't just a little boat anymore; I saw shrimping boats, major boats floating down this river, and they let out the nets. And he said, 'Let out my nets.' Just like he told Peter that day whenever he was out fishing and he threw the net over. He said, 'Lord, we've been fishing all night and we haven't caught anything.' He said, 'Just do what I tell you to do. Just be obedient to what I told you to do.' And I saw Peter throw out the net. But it was us, a modern-day Peter, sitting in these big shrimping boats. And we threw out the net, and it was no longer catching them one at a time, but we were catching them by the netfuls. And these were souls of men. And the Lord said, 'I'm going to make you a fisher of men. I'm going to make you a fisher in these last days of the greatest harvest we've ever seen before.' And from bank to bank, this dredge was pulling up all the fish from the bottom of the river, and they were catching them. And the nets were getting so full that I thought in this vision, 'They're going to break. These nets are going to break.' And they were big fish, small fish, tiny skinny fish, all kinds of beautiful fish. But they were the fish, and they were the harvest. And as that anointing started to increase, the waves were starting to move and the boat was moving. But then I saw an ocean, and the waves were really turbulent now. And the boat was bobbing up and down, but people weren't paying attention. But there was not just one boat; there was a fleet of boats. And they were all dragging the nets out in the water. And the harvest was plentiful, but the laborers were few. There weren't very many out there. But what laborers were out in the ocean? They were all catching loads of fish, and the nets of all these boats were pulling these boats almost completely into the water because the weight of the fish was so great. But there was great turbulence in the water, and the water was sloshing up on these boats, and I could see there was a great storm up in the sky. But on the horizon, I could see the dawning of time again. And the Lord said, 'You're running out of time. The harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few, Brandon, but there's going to be a great harvest.' And I saw the fish coming in. And it reminded me of the bells. If you remember the vision of the bells, I saw the bells. And he said to me—I saw the big church, and it was beautiful and glorious. This church was what used to be, but I saw tumbleweeds rolling around this church, if you remember. And I saw there was darkness in the church. But he said to me, 'Brandon, don't forget the bells, for there's going to be one more sound of a great awakening.' What do the bells do in the church? I saw the bells in the steeple of this church tower, and the bells were glowing with the glory of God. And there were written inscriptions all on these massive church bells, like it was at Notre-Dame or the cathedrals in Paris—massive church bells that were thousand-pound bells, huge bells. And all of a sudden, that church that was dark began to go, 'Bong, bong, bong, bong,' and it started ringing. But what was happening was it was sending shockwaves across the land of the glorious gospel waking up the church, and people had their attention drawn to the church bells because they were ringing in their ears. What was the bell telling us? That He's giving us one more time, one great harvest of souls before the Lord Jesus Christ comes back. And the bells of the church are ringing, ladies and gentlemen. And He's telling you, 'It's time to come back to church. It's time to come back to church.' But what was in the church in the last vision? Wooden pews of oak wood beams. And there was fire at the altar, and fire on each one of those chairs, and each one of them represented a person that was on fire for Jesus. And what did He tell you again? 'The babies are coming. The babies are coming.' They were dressed in sailor outfits. They were all out there. He said, 'But be careful with My babies. Treat them with respect. Be patient with them, for I was patient with you when you were a baby. Train them up, son, for they're coming. The bells are ringing, the church bells are ringing, and the angel choirs are singing.' How many of you are ready to be those shrimping boats out in the ocean catching the great harvest because the days are limited here? We have a little hair sliver of time before the Lord Jesus Christ comes and gets us. As we see this September come, as we see the fall come and the financial things with this Genesis and all these things being talked about, it's all being set up for the beast system. And that's why I said it's so important to pray for our leaders. It's so important to pray for our President Trump. It's so important to pray for Melania and for their marriage, because why? Because they're targets. It's who God chose for such a time as this. It's the Benjamins. It's because we are in the last of the last seconds. And I was reading, and it said Satan is frantic trying to destroy because he knows his days are numbered, and he's vicious and he's roaming around. He's going crazy, and that's when he's released. And I'm telling you folks, we're getting ready to step over that tribulation, but that's not for us. I told you, God's not a wife-beater. God's coming back for a glorious church without spot or wrinkle. And I'm telling you, we're not a part of the judgment. We're not a part of the wrath. We're not appointed unto wrath; we're His children. He's up there going, 'Hey, well done, son. You did good. You brought many, many of the souls that I've longed for.' Because He told me, He said, 'Brandon, I've looked forward to these days more than you have.' And I thought, 'What? Why? What are you waiting on? If you're looking forward to it, why haven't you done it yet then? Why haven't you started it yet? If you're looking forward to it, what's holding you back? Adam's lease, because He could have done it.' What's the restrainer? What's restraining the Lord? Why is He looking forward? Why are we waiting for something? What is this Adam's lease? It has to be. It's me speaking into it because it's what He's talking to me about. What is He looking for? What are we waiting for? Adam's lease. But when is Adam's lease over? During Rosh Hashanah. It's during the Feast of Trumpets, Yom Kippur, and all these things. This is the holy days, the high holy days. I believe that's what we're waiting for—those time frames, because he always talks about from Rosh Hashanah to Rosh Hashanah to these times. I don't know, folks. All I know is I have an anticipation, yes, that this isn't coincidence that he told us he'd give us a window for a harvest. But my question for you today is, do you know him? My question is, I've said a lot of cool stuff in all these things, but nothing matters. As we see Ozzy Osbourne, Black Sabbath, the prince of darkness, all these things that he said, and even in his last thing, I was reading his lips, he said Satan. He said all these things. Some people say he might have gotten born again. I don't know. I'm not here to judge him. All I know is, it is appointed unto man once to die. It's appointed unto man once to die and after that the judgment. To be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord, or in hell. But you choose every single day. You can serve Jesus or you can serve the devil. But it says that no man comes to the Father unless he is drawing them. That means you feel that tug right now. You may have that tug. You may be feeling it. You may be listening to Diana and me. She hasn't said much. But you may be listening to me and you may be saying, "I feel something when you're saying that something. I feel an itching on the inside of me." That's the Holy Spirit. He's trying to tell you it's your time. Yes. It's your choice today. And you say, "Whom will I serve?" You say, "Well, Brennan, I've been too messed up. I've sinned. I'm into pornography. I'm into drugs. I've cheated on my wife. I've cheated on my husband. I've done all these terrible things, and there's no way, maybe even murdered somebody. There's no way you think that God's willing and able to forgive you, but you're wrong. Jesus paid the price for you to walk in victory over every area in every area of your life. And I'm telling you, there's no sin too great for Jesus to forgive. The Bible says, 'If you confess your sins, he is faithful and just to forgive you of your sins and cleanse you from all unrighteousness.' Today is your day for salvation. Today's your day. You say, "Well, how do I get saved?" It's very simple and it's very easy. He made it so that a five-year-old can get saved, didn't he? Yes. If you—what the Bible says, 'with the heart confession is made unto salvation.' All you have to do is mean it in your heart. A child can mean it in the heart. A 100-year-old on their deathbed can sit there and mean something in their heart. You can just be barely stepping over there, just by the skin of your teeth at the last seconds of your life. That's why I said I hope Ozzy Osbourne said the sinner's prayer on his deathbed. I hope he said, "Jesus, I need you. Forgive me." I pray Jesus visited him. I pray he had an angelic encounter. I pray that no man... the Bible says he doesn't want that anyone should perish, but all come to repentance. God's a good God, ladies and gentlemen, and he loves you. Rest right where you are. That's why it says, 'just as I am without one plea.' Just as I am. It's just me. I'm messed up, but I know in my messing up, I need a savior today. I need Jesus. I know I can't do this life anymore without him. I'm at the end of my rope and I'm barely hanging on, and I've got butter on my fingers and it's slipping. Life is slipping. And the very shoes you put on today to go to work, the undertaker might be taking them off tonight. Do you understand? No man is promised tomorrow. You're playing with fire. If you think, 'Well, I'll come to Jesus maybe later on,' you may not have later on. This might be your only opportunity right now to accept Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal savior. Do not waste this time that you've been given right now as you're watching this video. As I talk to you, you could be slipping over tonight when you sleep. Choose today whom you will serve for eternity. Who will you serve today? Either you're going to heaven or you're going to hell. You say, "Well, I don't believe that." Well, that doesn't change it. Whether you believe it or you don't, that doesn't change it. Buddha didn't die for you. Muhammad didn't die for you. The only person who ever died for you is Jesus Christ. But he didn't just die. He rose again on the third day. And he's at the Father making intercession for you right now as we speak. Calling you in, "Come on, you can do it. All you have to do is yield yourself over to me." All you have to do is say, "Today is your day." He's ready to kill the fatted calf. You could be the prodigals today. You could be that prodigal today. He's waiting on you with his arms wide open, with a robe ready to put it on you, saying, "Welcome home, son. Welcome home, daughter." But all you have to do is get pride out of the way and say, "All I need is Jesus to save me." So, I want you to repeat this prayer after me right now. It doesn't have to be all religious. It's just something that's just personal. I told D, God, Jesus is not—it's not about religion. No, I hate religion, but I love relationship. Yes, it's about relationship. Do you understand? Jesus is a personable God. He's a friend. He's an ever-present help in a time of need. He knows all the things you're hurting. He knows the depression. He knows you're ready to give up on life and do self-harm. He knows everything you're going through. And it's not coincidence that you're here right now. But all you have to do is say this prayer and all of that is washed. It says as far as the east is from the west, he doesn't remember your sins anymore. He cast them in the sea of forgetfulness. He has forgiven you as you—he said, 'confess your sins, he is faithful and just to forgive you of your sins and cleanse you from it.'
